CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Continued To Apr-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DIAMOND FENCE COMPANY, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Diamond Fence Company, Inc.'s demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. A declaration must then be filed which specifies whether the meet and confer was in person or by telephone. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by January 13, 2023.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CK)
